CustomField.description: Marker for B1 (Phase B engagement seed) records. TRUE means this InteractionSummary stub was generated by FscEngagementSeed alongside its parent Interaction. Historical records remain FALSE and are never touched by the shifter.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscEngagementSeed / FscEngagementShifter. TRUE means this is generated demo-engagement data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Engagement
